task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the home screen or main interface of the Liverpool Cancer iChart app.

task_completion.description: Select or search for the cancer drug Venetoclax
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Venetoclax' being typed into a search bar or selected from a list of cancer drugs within the app.

task_completion.description: Select or search for the co-medication Ciprofloxacin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Ciprofloxacin' being typed into a search bar or selected from a list of co-medications within the app.

task_completion.description: View the interaction result for the selected drug pair
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a results screen explicitly listing both 'Venetoclax' and 'Ciprofloxacin' together.

task_completion.description: Identify the correct traffic light interaction color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The results screen displays an ORANGE or AMBER traffic light icon/color indicator for the Venetoclax and Ciprofloxacin interaction.

task_completion.description: Save the result to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a terminal command (e.g., echo) or a text editor saving the single lowercase word 'orange' (or 'amber') to the file path /sdcard/tasks/check_antibiotic_interaction_with_venetoclax/result.txt.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show step-by-step navigation within the iChart app interface, rather than a web browser search or hallucinating the answer directly in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent viewed the interaction result before writing the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates to the interaction result screen in the app prior to executing the command or action to write the result.txt file.

integrity.description: Agent saved the result as a single lowercase word
integrity.visual_evidence: The command or text editor used to create result.txt shows exactly one lowercase word (e.g., 'orange') without any additional text, punctuation, or explanation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct interaction severity color for Venetoclax and Ciprofloxacin in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app is ORANGE (or AMBER). Venetoclax is a CYP3A4 substrate and Ciprofloxacin is a moderate CYP3A4 inhibitor, requiring a dose reduction. The final text file must contain exactly one lowercase word matching this color (e.g., 'orange').
